extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT Wout won the flat sprint on Stage 1 after Jumbo-Visma executed a dominant leadout, holding off EWAN Caleb and GAVIRIA Fernando in the final 200m.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma controlled full final circuit with sustained pace that prevented Quick-Step organizing for BALLERINI or HODEG.
VELASCO Simone targeted intermediate sprint for GC positioning, exploiting that pure sprinters often skip bonus seconds mid-stage.
UAE Emirates committed two riders for GAVIRIA leadout but could not overpower Jumbo-Visma's sustained high-speed train.

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: converted perfect leadout positioning into sprint victory despite not expecting to beat pure sprinters at high speed
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: positioned on VAN AERT wheel but lacked acceleration to come around, suggesting timing or form deficit
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: positive: UAE committed full leadout and secured second, showing competitive sprint form early season
rider_signals.BALLERINI Davide: negative: Quick-Step isolated with no organized leadout despite team strength, eighth place suggests positioning failure
rider_signals.HODEG Álvaro José: neutral: Quick-Step tried late recovery with HODEG but no systematic leadout materialized, seventh place
rider_signals.ALBANESE Vincenzo: positive: won intermediate KOM sprint over BAKELANTS, securing climber's jersey through breakaway positioning
